title: Chamaefistula hartwegii
taxonomy: Chamaefistula hartwegii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. It is a member of the genus Chamaefistula, which is a part of the subfamily Faboideae. The family Fabaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that includes a wide range of legumes. The classification of Chamaefistula hartwegii reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Fabaceae family.
